case_title: DAGMAR HOHENECK VS. INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MENTORING INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY HOHENECK, DAGMAR AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MENTORING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-27-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506). PLAINTIFF APPEARED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
